title: TestRun
description: the EVENT of running a test — an activity that produces a TestResult

valid_from.description: business-truth window start — when this fact became true in the world; null = since-forever

valid_to.description: business-truth window end — when this fact stopped being true; null = still valid

confidence.description: reliability score for this instance; 1.0 = certain, 0 = no confidence

produced_by_change.description: the Change that created this entity (prov:wasGeneratedBy); reverse-query gives a change's creation set (#67)

evolved_by_change.description: the Changes that revised this entity, in order (prov:wasRevisionOf); reverse-query gives a change's revision set (#67)
